title: 10 Herbal Teas For Insect Bites
description: Taraxacum officinale teas contains compounds like flavonoids, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids that help reduce inflammation and soothe skin irritation caused by insect bites. The tea's anti-inflammatory properties, particularly the sesquiterpenes, can help calm the body's response to the bite, reducing redness and swelling.
